name: python3-ordered-set
title: python3-ordered-set
description:
ordered set implementation for Python 3
Pure Python implementation of an ordered set: a mutable set which keeps the
order of insertion of its elements.
.
This package provides the modules for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ordered-set because ordered set implementation for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ordered-set as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ordered-set with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ordered-set --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
